rationale: All required elements are present and correct: '2025 Revenue ($M)' title top-left, four #5B8CFF rounded-top bars proportional to 8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0, count-up value labels riding the bar tops (mid-growth tiles show 1.6, then 7.7/7.9/8.4/7.2), gray quarter labels, hold, and a full fade-out confirmed by the blank 100% still. The filmstrip shows a clean left-to-right staggered build with decelerating ease and the brief-mandated hold, no teleporting. Deviations are additive rather than wrong: an unbriefed 'QUARTERLY PERFORMANCE' subtitle plus y-axis ticks/gridlines, and the '16' tick crowds the subtitle baseline, slightly cluttering an otherwise balanced composition. Typography, gradients, and corner radii are consistent and near broadcast-ready; one small cleanup pass would ship it.
